title: Pareto Support Proofs: exact certificates and standalone verification
description: An exact certificate generator, a standalone generator-independent checker, machine-readable schemas, canonical proof objects and retained computational evidence for non-negative weighted-sum supportability and unsupportedness in finite multi-objective optimisation. Negative certificates are checked with exact rational arithmetic. Positive certificate objects distinguish fully checkable adapters from binary-linear objects that retain an explicitly declared trusted-oracle boundary. Source code is licensed under BSD-3-Clause; retained instances, proof objects, generated results, figures and prose documentation are licensed under CC BY 4.0.
